rights_agent: American Stock Transfer & Trust Company, LLC (depositary at close; CVR rights agent per agreement)
efforts_notes: For FDA Approval / STEMI recommendation, HRPCI, and Cardiogenic Shock milestones, J&J must expend an agreed amount based on Abiomed's existing budget (net of pre-close spend), subject to limited exceptions. Otherwise J&J is not required to achieve or employ any level of efforts/resources toward milestones.

milestones.description: Worldwide Net Sales of specified Abiomed products exceed $3.7 billion
milestones.deadline_primary: JNJ fiscal Q2 2027 through fiscal Q1 2028 (2028 Measurement Period)
milestones.deadline_fallback: Any four consecutive fiscal quarters from JNJ fiscal Q3 2027 through fiscal Q1 2029
milestones.notes: Full $17.50 if hit in primary window; else $8.75 if hit in fallback window.

milestones.description: FDA PMA or PMA supplement for Impella Product Family in STEMI / Anterior STEMI without cardiogenic shock
Class I ACC/AHA guideline recommendation for Impella in STEMI (no shock), high-risk PCI, or STEMI-CS from named studies (STEMI DTU, PROTECT IV, RECOVER IV)
milestones.notes: Payable on earliest of three sub-milestones; each also capped at four years after relevant study publication.

fairness_notes: Fairness opinion: not yet extracted; next agent action = pull ABMD Schedule 14D-9 / DEFM14A from EDGAR and cite banker CVR value if stated.
